_comment_1: Daily challenges configuration for the KeepPlay loyalty program.
_comment_2: Set challenges_enabled to false to show the coming-soon screen.
_comment_3: Set is_active to false on individual challenges to hide them.
_comment_4: display_order controls the sort order (lower = first).
